rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Cross-Complaint; Or In The Alt, To Allow Already Filed Cross-Complaint To Stand
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANTS TOSHIA WEBSTER and TINA WEBSTER'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File An Amended Cross-Complaint, Or In The Alternative, To Allow Already Filed Cross-Complaint To Stand is continued to October 30, 2007 per agreement of the parties. =(302/PJM)
